name: Fiddle Leaf Fig
description: Popular indoor tree with large glossy violin-shaped leaves. Loves bright, indirect light.

name: Bird of Paradise
description: Bold tropical statement plant with large paddle leaves that brings a jungle feel to any room.

name: Kentia Palm
description: Elegant indoor palm with graceful arching fronds. Tolerant of lower light and easy to care for.

name: Dragon Scale Alocasia
description: Rare alocasia prized for its deeply textured, dragon-scale patterned foliage.

name: Bambino Fiddle Leaf Fig
description: Compact dwarf fiddle leaf fig with the same striking leaves in a smaller, table-top form.

name: Sentry Palm
description: Lush relative of the kentia palm with fuller, slightly curlier fronds for a tropical centrepiece.

name: Blue Star Fern
description: Soft blue-green fern with unusual lobed fronds. Perfect for shady, humid corners.

name: Calathea Orbifolia
description: Prayer plant with large rounded leaves striped in silver and green. Loves a humid spot.

name: Monstera Deliciosa
description: The classic Swiss Cheese Plant with iconic split leaves. Fast growing and full of character.

name: Monstera Adansonii
description: Trailing Swiss Cheese Vine with delicate holey leaves. Looks beautiful climbing a moss pole.

name: Variegated Monstera
description: Highly sought-after Monstera with stunning cream and green variegated leaves.

name: Monstera Laniata
description: Glossy wide-leaf form of the Swiss Cheese Vine with dramatic fenestrations as it matures.

name: Blue Columnar Cactus
description: Striking blue-green columnar cactus that thrives in bright light and needs very little water.

name: Chilean Spiral Cactus
description: Unusual slow-growing columnar cactus with a natural spiralling form. A real collector's piece.

name: Snake Plant
description: Hardy upright succulent with tall variegated leaves. Almost impossible to kill and great for clean air.

name: Chinese Money Plant
description: Charming pilea with round coin-like leaves. Said to bring good fortune and easy to propagate.

name: Golden Pothos
description: Easy trailing vine with heart-shaped golden-marbled leaves. Ideal for shelves and hanging pots.

name: Streptocarpus Pretty Turtle
description: Compact plant with textured turtle-shell foliage and pretty seasonal blooms.
